supersession.changed_boundary: Universe and Yahoo chart acquisition use only functions or endpoints contained in the pinned global-stock-data commit.

universe.primary_function: Pinned SKILL.md yahoo_quote_summary('XLG', ['topHoldings']) using get_yahoo_session exactly once; freeze raw quoteSummary response.
universe.primary_acceptance: topHoldings.holdings must yield 50 or 51 eligible symbol/name lines and exactly 50 normalized companies; no inferred or padded rows.
universe.fallback_endpoint: Only pinned SKILL.md market_stock_list Eastmoney push2 clist endpoint, for m:105 and m:106; request f12,f14,f20, rank each by f20 descending, take at most 100 per market, merge by explicit total-market-cap f20 descending, exclude m:107 ETF/other, then require 50 normalized companies and at most 51 security lines.
universe.fallback_failure: Missing/nonpositive f20, insufficient rows, instrument or company identity ambiguity, or inability to distinguish eligible ordinary stock lines is INPUT_BLOCKED.
universe.multi_class_rule: Within a company, retain the line with higher median raw-close times volume over the latest 60 complete common Yahoo sessions; insufficient sessions or tie fails closed.
universe.known_bias: Execution-date current universe is fixed backward through history and is explicitly survivorship/look-ahead biased.

prices.primary: Pinned SKILL.md stock_kline_yahoo endpoint/code: query2 Yahoo chart with interval=1d and range=max; freeze raw bytes/URL/retrieved_at/SHA256; require raw OHLCV and adjclose semantics.
prices.crosscheck: Stooq daily raw close only; no row fusion.
prices.symbols: Exactly frozen current Top-50 lines after class selection plus SPY and XLG, maximum 52.
prices.raw_close_gate: At least 98% of overlap within 0.5% per symbol.
prices.unresolved_rule: Quarantine unresolved symbols; more than 5 is INPUT_BLOCKED; at most 3 bounded corporate-action/outlier inspections.

central_data.priority: Complete and verify canonical materialization before strategy outcome access.
central_data.writer: quant_system.data.writer.append_rows with existing writer lock and DuckDB transaction
central_data.publication: Acquire and validate all staging rows first, isolated-copy append/idempotency/conflict test, exact backup, then one bounded canonical publication; append only missing conflict-free identities.
central_data.postwrite: Exact receipt with symbol/date/row counts, duplicate keys, nonfinite values, coverage, source hashes, DB identity, WAL, and openers.

strategy.formation_execution: Month-end close formation; next trading-session close execution; new weights apply to later close-to-close returns.
strategy.selection: Top 10, retain prior holdings through rank 15, ascending symbol tie-break, equal 10% weights, long-only, no leverage.
strategy.primary_benchmark: Same-date equal weight qualified frozen-current-universe; XLG and SPY diagnostic only.

forbidden: provider or endpoint absent from pinned repository except Stooq cross-check
historical members, fundamentals, industry, valuation, news, ML, optimizer, intraday, options, hedges
